text:
Pav Lucistnik wrote:
>> mt-daapd version 0.2.4.2 released
>>     
>
> Mark, you're okay with this new patch?
>
>   
Well there is now some confusion. Either way will work.
Either apply this new patch and close 123284 as well, or apply my patch 
and then the one in 123284. The end result is the same (that we get 
mt-daapd to version 0.2.4.2)
Thanks.
